caption: A sequence of overhead shots shows various military aircraft parked on a wide, light-gray concrete airfield surrounded by grassy fields under a cloudy sky. In the background, several long, tan-colored hangars line the perimeter of the facility. As the perspective shifts, different aircraft are brought into view. The scene begins with a mix of grey cargo planes and a smaller white jet on the tarmac. As the camera pans across the airfield, it reveals more specialized aircraft, including a large grey transport plane and a distinctive white AWACS aircraft featuring a large radar dome on its fuselage. A few figures in light-colored clothing are visible standing on the ground near the planes, appearing small against the scale of the aircraft. There is no legible on-screen text or logos visible in the frames.
